use_cases: Displaying software download options for different platforms like Windows, Mac, and Linux
Presenting multiple download format choices such as direct download, installer, or portable versions
Offering tiered download options like free vs premium versions
Allowing users to select between different download sources or mirrors
Showcasing download-related CTAs with variant styling for primary and secondary actions
ai_summary: A download options section component that showcases multiple download choices and call-to-action buttons. Features a composite design with flexible button variants supporting different states and styles. Designed for displaying software download options, file formats, or version selections across platforms. Includes shadow effects and hover states for interactive feedback, suitable for SaaS products, developer tools, and media platforms needing download functionality.
